mapper.sql: e.id, e.creator_user_id, e.title_hr, e.title_en, e.where_hr, e.where_en, e.address, e.about_hr, e.about_en, e.when_iso, e.start_at, e.end_at, e.event_type, e.latitude, e.longitude, e.entrance_latitude, e.entrance_longitude, e.entry_instructions_hr, e.entry_instructions_en, e.visibility, e.attendance_mode, e.price_amount, e.price_currency, e.capacity, e.status, e.organizer_rating_average, e.organizer_rating_count, e.participant_count

(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_likes el_count WHERE el_count.event_id = e.id) AS like_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event_likes el_me WHERE el_me.event_id = e.id AND el_me.user_id = #{userId} ) AS liked_by_me
(6371 * acos(least(1, greatest(-1, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(e.latitude)) * cos(radians(e.longitude) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(e.latitude)) ))))
mapper.select: SELECT , , ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE e.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT , , ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE e.id = #{id} AND LIMIT 1

SELECT , , ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE
e.creator_user_id = #{userId}
ep.status IN ('joined', 'approved', 'waitlisted')
e.creator_user_id = #{userId} OR ep.status IN ('joined', 'approved', 'waitlisted')
ORDER BY e.start_at ASC

SELECT , , ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM event_likes el INNER JOIN events e ON e.id = el.event_id LEFT JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} WHERE el.user_id = #{userId} AND ORDER BY el.created_at DESC, e.start_at DESC, e.id DESC
SELECT id, event_id, media_type, url, thumbnail_url, sort_order FROM event_media WHERE event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e WHERE e.visibility = 'public'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO events ( id, creator_user_id, title_hr, title_en, where_hr, where_en, address, about_hr, about_en, when_iso, start_at, end_at, event_type, latitude, longitude, entrance_latitude, entrance_longitude, entry_instructions_hr, entry_instructions_en, visibility, attendance_mode, price_amount, price_currency, capacity, status, organizer_rating_average, organizer_rating_count, participant_count ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{creatorUserId}, #{titleHr}, #{titleEn}, #{whereHr}, #{whereEn}, #{address}, #{aboutHr}, #{aboutEn}, #{whenIso}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{eventType}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{entranceLatitude}, #{entranceLongitude}, #{entryInstructionsHr}, #{entryInstructionsEn}, #{visibility}, #{attendanceMode}, #{priceAmount}, #{priceCurrency}, #{capacity}, #{status}, #{organizerRatingAverage}, #{organizerRatingCount}, #{participantCount} )
INSERT INTO event_media ( id, event_id, media_type, url, thumbnail_url, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{mediaType}, #{url}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{sortOrder} )

INSERT INTO event_participants ( event_id, user_id, status, joined_at, approved_at ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{userId}, #{status}, NOW(), CASE WHEN #{status} = 'joined' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END ) ON CONFLICT (event_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, joined_at = CASE WHEN event_participants.status = 'left' THEN NOW() ELSE event_participants.joined_at END, approved_at = EXCLUDED.approved_at
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET participant_count = participant_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{eventId}
UPDATE events SET participant_count = GREATEST(participant_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{eventId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event_organizer_ratings ( event_id, organizer_user_id, rater_user_id, rating, comment ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{organizerUserId}, #{raterUserId}, #{rating}, #{comment} ) ON CONFLICT (event_id, rater_user_id) DO UPDATE SET rating = EXCLUDED.rating, comment = EXCLUDED.comment, organizer_user_id = EXCLUDED.organizer_user_id, created_at = NOW()
